captions_untagged.explicit: Finally took my car out for a proper drive and ended up running into Jason by the patio tables. An unplanned hangout in the sun is always the best kind.
captions_untagged.moderate: Always a good time wasting the afternoon and catching up with the local car crowd when the weather gets this nice.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Such a beautiful classic. The way that pale blue paint catches the afternoon light is just perfect.
